attributes.name: Tier List Catalog
attributes.summary: The Tier List definition provides a customizable interface for ranking and organizing items across multiple tiers. It allows users to view, create, and modify tiers, assign items to specific tiers through dragging-and-dropping, and visualize the tier distribution. The component supports filtering unranked items, color-coding tiers, and dynamically updating rankings. It is primarily designed for visualizing hierarchical rankings, managing tier structures, and facilitating easy reordering of items within a tiered system.
